name: Root Certificate Installation Detected
description: Detects the installation of a root certificate, a technique adversaries may use to bypass security warnings when connecting to malicious servers.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'certutil.exe' or 'CertMgr.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the certificate utility executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the certificate utility, including '-addstore' or '/add' and the certificate file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the certificate installation occurred.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
